title: ARIMA Model Construction Flowchart
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process of building and diagnosing an Autoregressive Integrated Moving Average (ARIMA) model, highlighting the iterative Box-Jenkins methodology.
relationships: Original data is tested for stationarity; if non-stationary, it is differenced 'd' times
ACF/PACF plots of stationary data guide the choice of 'p' (AR order) and 'q' (MA order)
The combined ARIMA(p,d,q) model is fitted to the data
Residuals are analyzed to check if they resemble white noise; if not, the process iterates with new p,d,q parameters
